# Presentation Outputs

This page maps generated presentation exports that are intentionally retained
for packaged review. These files are derived presentation artifacts, not source
evidence, benchmark evidence, legal review, release approval, or production
claims.

The Markdown briefs, `index.html`, patent package, validation notes, and
committed benchmark artifacts remain the authoritative source material. If a
presentation export disagrees with the repository sources, refresh or replace
the export rather than changing evidence claims to match the slide file.

## Generated Files

- [`outputs/019e4b94-fd4a-79c3-b707-77404ef5f0b9/presentations/neurofhe-vc-pitch/output/neurofhe-relay-vc-pitch-deck.pptx`](../outputs/019e4b94-fd4a-79c3-b707-77404ef5f0b9/presentations/neurofhe-vc-pitch/output/neurofhe-relay-vc-pitch-deck.pptx)
  - generated PowerPoint export for packaged review of the NeuroFHE Relay VC
    pitch deck.

## Handling Rules

- Keep generated presentation files out of benchmark and release-evidence
  counts.
- Do not treat slide wording as stronger than `README.md`, `RELEASE.md`,
  `VALIDATION.md`, or `docs/evidence-guide.md`.
- Preserve CC0/public-domain framing and the research-alpha caveats in any
  refreshed export.
- Do not add private partner data, raw datasets, secrets, or unsupported
  medical, surveillance, deployment, cryptographic, or performance claims.

Validation checks that every tracked file under `outputs/` is represented on
this page.
